prompt: A moody gothic storybook illustration in thick impasto oil-paint style, showing a solitary little girl sitting curled up on a cushioned window seat inside a dim old room during a rainy evening. She has dark brown wild tangled hair, a large oversized knit sweater in rust red, black-and-cream striped stockings, and dark lace-up boots. Her pose is introspective and withdrawn, knees pulled to her chest, arms wrapped around her legs, gazing out through a tall multi-pane window. Outside the glass is a crooked, haunted-looking European village street with steep rooftops, spires, glowing windows, slick cobblestones, and a prominent clock tower, all under a gray stormy sky. Include exactly 1 small umbrella-carrying figure walking alone in the rain on the street. Inside the room, include exactly 1 hanging industrial lamp with warm yellow light in the upper left, exactly 1 red ceramic mug on the windowsill, exactly 1 open sketchbook on the bench with a dark cat drawing visible on one page, exactly 2 red pillows, and a few tiny framed wall pictures on the left. The palette is charcoal gray, sepia, black, and muted amber, with warm interior highlights contrasting against the cold wet exterior. The composition is slightly tilted and cinematic, with the girl placed left of center and the rain-soaked town filling the right side of the frame. Emphasize melancholy, loneliness, gothic whimsy, textured brushstrokes, scratched paint, dramatic window reflections, and a dark fairy-tale atmosphere in a square format.
